name: Human
description: Dominant race in the current era, victors of the Great Demi-Human War and rulers of the Human Empire.

name: Elf
description: Graceful demi-humans formerly ruling royal kingdoms, now largely enslaved or oppressed.

name: Dwarf
description: Stout demi-humans known for their blacksmithing, mining, and combat prowess, now also subjugated.

name: Mixed-Blood Demi-Human
description: Mixed-lineage demi-humans like Blue who carry traits of multiple races.

name: Fairy
description: Mystical beings tied to the Tree of Life, many of whom sacrificed themselves to form the crystal shell.
